title: Fix My Chats interface to enable opening and replying to messages

requirements.text: Debug and fix the ChatDialog component in frontend/src/components/ChatDialog.tsx to ensure it opens correctly when accessed from the My Chats section, properly loads conversation history, and allows users to send and receive messages

quotes: unable to use my chats option unable to open msgs and reply

acceptanceCriteria: ChatDialog opens without errors when clicked from My Chats/messages section
Conversation history loads and displays correctly
Users can type and send messages successfully
Sent messages appear in the conversation view
No console errors when opening or using the chat interface

requirements.text: Verify and fix the ConversationList component in frontend/src/components/ConversationList.tsx to ensure conversations are clickable and properly trigger the ChatDialog to open with the correct conversation context (listing ID, seller/buyer phone numbers)

quotes: unable to use my chats option unable to open msgs and reply

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking on a conversation in the list opens the ChatDialog
ChatDialog receives correct listing ID and phone numbers
Conversation context is maintained when switching between chats
Click handlers are properly attached and functioning

requirements.text: Debug and fix the ProfilePage messages tab in frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx to ensure it correctly renders the ConversationList component and handles conversation selection/navigation without errors

quotes: unable to use my chats option unable to open msgs

acceptanceCriteria: Messages tab displays conversations correctly
No errors when switching to the messages tab
Conversation selection triggers proper chat interface opening
Unread message indicators display accurately

requirements.text: Verify and fix the useConversations and useMessages query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to ensure they correctly fetch conversation data from the backend and handle loading/error states properly

quotes: unable to use my chats option

acceptanceCriteria: useConversations hook successfully fetches all user conversations
useMessages hook retrieves messages for specific conversations
Loading states are handled correctly
Error states are caught and displayed to users
Data structure matches backend response format

requirements.text: Add comprehensive error logging and user feedback throughout the chat flow (ConversationList, ChatDialog, ProfilePage messages tab) to identify and display specific issues preventing users from opening or replying to messages

quotes: unable to open msgs and reply

acceptanceCriteria: Console logs capture key events (conversation click, dialog open, message send attempts)
User-visible error messages explain what went wrong
Error boundaries prevent entire UI from breaking
Network errors are distinguished from validation errors

constraints: Do not modify the backend chat message storage or retrieval functions
Maintain existing mobile phone number authentication system
Preserve the current conversation data structure and message format
nonGoals: Adding new chat features beyond basic open and reply functionality
Implementing real-time message updates or WebSocket connections
Adding message notifications or push alerts
